name: Boltz Bird Litter Spray, Medium, 200 ml, 1 Piece
description: Boltz bird litter spray acts as disinfectant and antimicrobial agent | Natural extract: Boltz bird litter spray contains lemon grass perfume which will make your bird cage smell fresh | Remove litter odour: Boltz bird litter spray removes birds litter odour in cages | Cage freshener: It acts as freshener for your birds and birds like lemon grass fragrance | Easy to use: Spray 6-7 sprays in bird cage and around it after cleaning as per smell and size of cage
